---
title: "Corvus Estate: Bead Critique Hand-off Status"
date: 2026-03-09
status: paused
---

# Critique Loop Progress Tracker

## 1. Status Summary
The "Extreme Polish" architectural review is currently in the **SecureSphere** spoke. We are moving bead-by-bead, applying senior-level engineering critiques and structural mitigations.

## 2. Progress Table

| Spoke | Bead ID | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **KeepOS** | `KOS-PL-00` | ✅ Approved | Scalable graphics tiers, "Carrier" sync visuals. |
| | `KOS-PL-01` | ✅ Approved | Royal UI with "Agnostic Agent Conduit" auras. |
| | `KOS-PL-02` | ✅ Approved | Household Quant Analysis vs. Child Academy models. |
| | `KOS-PL-03` | ✅ Approved | Hall of Records as "Family Tree," persistent memory. |
| **Astrologer** | `AST-PL-00` | ✅ Approved | PennyOne skeleton, Galactic Disk (Z=Time). |
| | `AST-PL-01` | ✅ Approved | Non-blocking handshakes, local encrypted RAM index. |
| | `AST-PL-02` | ✅ Approved | Spotify-linked soundscape, focus-sharpening UI. |
| | `AST-PL-03` | ✅ Approved | Star Trek Command Keys, 60s biometric auth window. |
| **SecureSphere** | `SSP-PL-00` | ✅ Approved | Docker-isolated Forge, eBPF sampling, voice keys. |
| | `SSP-PL-01` | ⏳ Pending | Mitigations proposed for Policy Arbiter & Port Clusters. |
| | `SSP-PL-02` | ⏹️ Next | Tactical Defense Center / War Room. |
| | `SSP-PL-03` | ⏹️ Next | Co-Evolutionary Forge Loop. |
| **CorvusEye** | `CEY-PL-00` | ⏹️ Next | Synthetic Vulnerability Researcher. |
| | `CEY-PL-01` | ⏹️ Next | Restricted Offensive Governor. |
| | `CEY-PL-02` | ⏹️ Next | Digital Iris UI. |
| | `CEY-PL-03` | ⏹️ Next | Adversarial Arms-Race Orchestrator. |
| **XO** | `XO-PL-00` | ⏹️ Next | Lifelong Cognitive Growth Engine. |
| | `XO-PL-01` | ⏹️ Next | Strategic Mastering Protocol. |
| | `XO-PL-02` | ⏹️ Next | Trans-Spatial Learning Bridge. |
| | `XO-PL-03` | ⏹️ Next | Cross-System Mission Protocol. |

## 3. Pending Approval (`SSP-PL-01`)
The last critique provided structural mitigations for:
1. **Unified Policy Arbiter:** Preventing Curfew/Quest rule overlaps in Rust.
2. **Graceful Warnings:** Notifying users before TTL-based port closure.
3. **Port Clustering:** Visualizing active service clusters instead of individual port noise.
4. **Atomic Transactions:** Ensuring UI "Gates" only open if the OS command succeeds.

**Next Step:** Resume with approval of `SSP-PL-01` and dispatch sub-agent for `SSP-PL-02`.
